definitions: An exclamation used by Muslims to invoke or address Allah (God) in prayer, supplication, or as an expression of strong emotion such as surprise, distress, or gratitude.
Used to express a plea or a call for divine intervention or assistance.
An expression of awe, wonder, or reverence towards God.
examples: Oh Allah, guide us on the straight path.
Oh Allah, grant me strength during this trial.
Oh Allah, thank you for this blessing.
